text: - iii. If  the  Additional  Insured  requirements  are  deemed  to  violate  any  law,  statute  or  ordinance,  the additional insured requirements, including any additional insured policy provision or endorsements procured  pursuant  to  this  Agreement,  shall  be  reformed  to  provide  the  maximum  amount  of protection to the Contractor Parties as allowed under the law.
